command:
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "MUD: %{time_total}s %{size_download}B
" http://localhost:4042/stats && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Lock: %{time_total}s %{size_download}B
" http://localhost:4043/ && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "PLATO: %{time_total}s %{size_download}B
" http://localhost:8847/status && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Shell: %{time_total}s %{size_download}B
" http://localhost:8848/status && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Grammar: %{time_total}s %{size_download}B
" http://localhost:4045/stats 2>/dev/null
